mapper.select: SELECT 'RC_CF_TR' as recommendPanelContentType, rcmmd_mforu_id as recommendId, disp_std_end_dt as avaliableDateTime, disp_sn as dispSn FROM tb_rcmmd_mforu WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} AND disp_std_start_dt <= NOW() AND disp_std_end_dt >= NOW() UNION ALL SELECT 'RC_SML_TR' as recommendPanelContentType, rcmmd_similar_track_id as recommendId, disp_std_end_dt as avaliableDateTime, disp_sn as dispSn FROM tb_rcmmd_similar_track WHERE character_no =#{characterNo} AND disp_std_start_dt <= NOW() AND disp_std_end_dt >= NOW() UNION ALL SELECT 'RC_GR_TR' as recommendPanelContentType, rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id as recommendId, disp_std_end_dt as avaliableDateTime, disp_sn as dispSn FROM tb_rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} AND disp_std_start_dt <= NOW() AND disp_std_end_dt >= NOW() UNION ALL SELECT 'RC_ATST_TR' as recommendPanelContentType, rcmmd_artist_id as recommendId, disp_std_end_dt as avaliableDateTime, disp_sn as dispSn FROM tb_rcmmd_artist WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} AND disp_std_start_dt <= NOW() AND disp_std_end_dt >= NOW() UNION ALL SELECT 'RC_MD_CN' as recommendPanelContentType, rcmmd_listen_mood_id as recommendId, disp_std_end_dt as avaliableDateTime, disp_sn as dispSn FROM tb_rcmmd_listen_mood WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} AND disp_std_start_dt <= NOW() AND disp_std_end_dt >= NOW()
